assessment.note: She named mentoring as the work that matters to her, which is a mild positive growth and engagement signal; earlier answers also suggest unresolved clarity around scope.

new_queue.label: Mentoring stretch
new_queue.name: Mentoring matters to you — what about it feels stretching?
new_queue.description: Drills into why mentoring feels like meaningful growth rather than adjacent work.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next level concrete
new_queue.name: What would make the next level feel concrete for you?
new_queue.description: Pushes from abstract ambition into the specific shape of Principal-plus scope and expectations.

new_queue.label: Manager investment
new_queue.name: What should I change in how I'm supporting your growth?
new_queue.description: Opens the manager's side of the investment conversation before asking for the employee's trade-offs.
